# Celery Stocks

> Professional financial terminal for real-time market data and analysis.

## About

Celery Stocks is a web-based professional financial terminal that provides real-time stock and cryptocurrency quotes, portfolio tracking, SEC filings, financial statement analysis, an AI-powered assistant, and collaborative chatrooms. It uses a terminal-style interface with a customizable dashboard layout.

## Features

- Real-time stock and cryptocurrency price quotes
- Interactive candlestick and line charts
- Portfolio tracking with performance analysis
- SEC filings browser (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, and more)
- Financial statement analysis (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow)
- Institutional and insider holder data
- Stock screener
- Market overview and most active stocks
- Financial news aggregation
- AI-powered financial assistant for analysis and questions
- Collaborative chatrooms for discussing trades and ideas
- Direct messaging between users
- Customizable terminal dashboard with draggable panels
- Command palette for quick navigation

## Access

Celery Stocks requires user authentication. Public pages are /login and /signup.
The application is free to use after creating an account.

## Technology

Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS.
Market data sourced via Yahoo Finance. AI features powered by OpenAI.
